key_insights.insight: The body is designed to work for you, not against you, and many modern practices are actually detrimental.
key_insights.quote: Our body is very much, it's actually, it's actually for us. And many of the things we're choosing to do are against us.

key_insights.insight: Weight loss injections can lead to muscle loss, which negatively impacts longevity and insulin sensitivity.
key_insights.quote: They're actually losing more muscle than they are losing fat. So yes, you feel thinner,but it's not because you lost fat, you lost muscle. Muscle is the organ of longevity.

key_insights.insight: Muscle mass is crucial for functionality and metabolic health as we age, and losing it makes weight gain more likely.
key_insights.quote: The minute muscle goes away your functionality goes away but more importantly the minute muscle goes away you're more insulin resistant so you're going to gain weight more down the long haul

key_insights.insight: Excessive cardio can increase cortisol levels in women, leading to hormonal imbalances and potential fat storage.
key_insights.quote: Cortisol goes up because you're doing so much cardio. So progesterone goes down because cortisol goes up, progesterone goes down. Well, progesterone keeps estrogen in check. So now estrogen can go up. And if you have too much estrogen, eventually what's going to happen is it's going to be stored as fat.

key_insights.insight: Deodorants can block lymph pathways in the armpit, potentially hindering the body's detoxification process.
key_insights.quote: Deodorant clogs that up and so it doesn't mobilize all of the toxins out.

key_insights.insight: The hair in our armpits and pubic region is there to help mobilize toxins out of the body.
key_insights.quote: The hair ends up becoming like this way that we can mobilize the toxins out of us.

actionable_advice.advice: Scrub your underarms with a loofah during showers to open up lymph pathways.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a loofah or organic sponge to gently exfoliate the underarm area while showering.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize weightlifting over excessive cardio for weight loss and overall health.
actionable_advice.how_to: Incorporate resistance training exercises into your workout routine, focusing on building and maintaining muscle mass. Limit excessive cardio.

actionable_advice.advice: Build more muscle and fast more to get rid of glucose stored in muscles, and break your fast with protein.
actionable_advice.how_to: Incorporate fasting windows in your daily routine. Prioritize protein as the first meal after the fast.

memorable_stories: Host's father struggling to get out of a chair after knee surgery at 86 highlights the importance of muscle strength for functionality in old age.
Host's experience walking down steep stairs in Bali and thinking about his father's inability to do the same
contrarian_claims: Cardio is primarily beneficial for mental health, not weight loss.
Weight loss injections can be detrimental in the long run due to muscle loss.
The body is not against you.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 147: Stop These Habits That Are Destroying Your Body!: Mindy Pelz
